item_title: Update CHANGELOG.md and create release notes for semantic embeddings feature
summary: Added comprehensive CHANGELOG.md entry documenting all embedding-related PRDs (AR-501 through AR-515). Created RELEASE_NOTES.md (1018 words) with overview, migration guide, performance impact, troubleshooting, upgrade checklist, and quick start section.
pattern_that_worked: Created RELEASE_NOTES.md with all required sections: overview, what changed, migration guide, performance impact, troubleshooting, upgrade checklist, quick start, credits, and PRD references.
validation_hint: Validation commands: grep -c embeddings in CHANGELOG (6), word count in RELEASE_NOTES (1018), PRD references (26 matches)
